metadata.description: MCP server for easyTable restaurant reservations — check availability, look up bookings, and create, modify or cancel reservations. Routes through the user's signed-in book.easytable.com tab via the fetchproxy browser extension, reusing the user's existing Cloudflare-cleared session; create/modify read the booking widget's Cloudflare Turnstile token from the tab's DOM.

plugins.name: easytable-mcp
plugins.description: MCP server for easyTable — restaurant availability plus create/modify/cancel bookings
